use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF MODERATE TO SEVERE DEMENTIA OF THE ALZHEIMER'S TYPE

indications.text:
NAMENDA (memantine hydrochloride) is indicated for the treatment of moderate to severe
dementia of the Alzheimer’s type.
